practice.name: IMO 2019/1
practice.statement: Let $\mathbb{Z}$ be the set of integers. Determine all functions $f: \mathbb{Z} \rightarrow \mathbb{Z}$ such that, for all integers $a$ and $b$, $$ f(2a)+2f(b)=f(f(a+b)). $$

practice.name: Japan Finals 2012/2
practice.statement: Find all functions $f\colon \mathbb R\rightarrow \mathbb R$ such that $$f(f(x+y)f(x-y))=x^2-yf(y).$$

practice.name: Canada 2015/1
practice.statement: Let $\mathbb{N} = \{1, 2, 3, \ldots\}$ be the set of positive integers. Find all functions $f$, defined on $\mathbb{N}$ and taking values in $\mathbb{N}$, such that $(n-1)^2< f(n)f(f(n)) < n^2+n$ for every positive integer $n$

practice.name: Benelux 2025/1
practice.statement: Does there exist a function $f:\mathbb{R}	o \mathbb{R}$ such that $$f(x^2+f(y))=f(x)^2-y$$ for all $x, y\in \mathbb{R}$?

practice.name: PAGMO 2024/5
practice.statement: Find all functions $f: \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$ such that $f(f(x+y) - f(x)) + f(x)f(y) = f(x^2) - f(x+y),$ for all real numbers $x, y$.

practice.name: ISL 2015 C2
practice.statement: Determine all functions $f:\mathbb{Z}\rightarrow\mathbb{Z}$ with the property that $$f(x-f(y))=f(f(x))-f(y)-1$$ holds for all $x,y\in\mathbb{Z}$.
